title: Northern Council Panorama
description: Changes the menu panorama to the Northern Council from the Unstable SMP
body:
The Northern Council is a build on the Unstable SMP built by the Law. This resource pack turns the menu panorama into the Northern Council.

I used the map from [UnstableSMP - Law Fight](https://modrinth.com/project/ZwWTJxVd) to make this panorama and I used [Panorama Screenshot](https://modrinth.com/project/K3RHGadZ) to take the screenshots and format them easily.

This resource pack is also included in my modpack, [Unstable SMP Recreation](https://modrinth.com/project/SU0WjsoL).
